positive: A stylized, intricate celestial map print. The central motif features a bold, sweeping constellation formed by glowing nebula trails, anchored by a stylized, geometric crescent moon and a single, stylized, four-pointed star. The background should be deep indigo and velvet black, subtly patterned with faint, glowing abstract scientific diagrams (like orbits or repeating polyhedra). Use a high-contrast, neo-tribal, stained-glass etching style with vibrant cyan, cosmic violet, and metallic gold inks. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, optimized for a single, continuous, repeatable print panel, with clean, strong outlines and clear negative space. Cinematic volumetric lighting emanating from the stars, designed to look fantastic on a dark fabric.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grain, dirty, muted, realistic photograph, signature
